holdings.infoBox: GSEW is an equity ETF with a total of 500 individual holdings. The top holdings are Woodward stock at 0.24%, Moderna at 0.23%, Blackstone at 0.23%, Robinhood Markets at 0.23%, and Western Digital at 0.23%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Equal Weight U.S. Large Cap Equity ETF (GSEW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US large-cap stocks. GSEW was launched on Sep 12, 2017 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
infoTable: Solactive US Large Cap Equal Weight Index (GTR)

data.title: "ETF's are here to stay" says Todd Rosenbluth of TMX VETTAFI
data.text: Todd Rosenbluth, Head of Research TMX VETTAFI, joins CNBC's "Halftime Report" to discuss the record year for the ETF industry.
